NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you requested does not exist.

Dashboard.heading: Dashboard
Dashboard.welcome: Welcome back. Here is today's operations overview.
Dashboard.emptyNoProjects: No projects yet. Create a new project to get started.

Auth.title: Sign in
Auth.subtitle: Enter your email. If you already set a password, you'll sign in with email and password. First-time or accounts without a password yet will use a one-time code (OTP).
Auth.signInSubtitle: If you set a password, enter your account email and password. If you have not set a password yet, submit without a password and we will email you a code.
Auth.registerSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send a one-time code (OTP) to complete registration or verification.
Auth.passwordOptionalHint: If your account has no password yet, leave the password blank and submit to receive a verification code instead.
Auth.registerEmailAlreadyHasPassword: This email already has a password. Use the Sign in tab with your password.
Auth.otpStepSubtitle: We sent a code to {email}. Enter all 6 digits below.
Auth.otpFormatHint: Digits only. Pasting a full code will submit automatically when complete.
Auth.resent: A new code has been sent. Check your inbox.
Auth.otpSent: Check your inbox for the 6-digit code.
Auth.otpOnlyHint: Do not use any link in the email—enter only the 6-digit code here. If emails still include a link, change your Supabase email template to OTP-only.
Auth.forgotEmailSubtitle: Enter your registered email. We'll send a 6-digit code so you can reset your password.
Auth.forgotOtpSubtitle: A verification code has been sent to {email}. Once verified, you can set a new password.
Auth.forgotNoPassword: This email has no password set yet. Please use the Sign in or Sign up tab to log in with a one-time code instead.
Auth.forgotNewPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for {email} (at least 8 characters).
Auth.forgotTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
Auth.forgotUpdateFailed: Could not update the password. Please try again.
Auth.passwordUpdatedPleaseSignIn: Password updated. Please sign in again with your new password.

SetPassword.title: Set your password
SetPassword.subtitle: Choose a password of at least 8 characters to protect your account.
SetPassword.hint: Registered accounts sign in with this email and password. First-time verification still uses an email code.
SetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
SetPassword.errorGeneric: Could not set password. Please try again.
SetPassword.errorFlag: Password was saved in auth, but status could not be updated. Contact support.

Welcome.title: Welcome
Welcome.subtitle: Update your profile, then choose whether to create a new company tenant or register as a vendor / external translator.
Welcome.profileHint: Update your display name and UI language.
Welcome.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Welcome.identityHint: Choose whether to create your own company tenant or register as a vendor / external translator.
Welcome.vendorDescription: If you represent another translation company, external agency, or freelance translator, register here (permissions are managed separately).
Welcome.vendorCta: I represent a vendor / external agency
Welcome.vendorRegistered: You are registered as a platform vendor.
Welcome.createTenantHint: Initialize your organization and verify a company-domain email.

Invite.title: Accept tenant invitation
Invite.subtitle: Enter the invited email. You'll sign in with password or a one-time code, then join the tenant.
Invite.emailMismatch: That email does not match this invitation, or the invite is no longer valid.
Invite.otpExplain: A code was sent to {email}. Enter the 6-digit code below.
Invite.completeSignIn: Complete sign-in for {email} (password or code as shown).

Onboarding.title: Set up your organization
Onboarding.subtitle: Tell us who you are and verify a company-domain email.
Onboarding.workEmailHint: Please avoid common consumer providers (e.g. Gmail, Yahoo).
Onboarding.workspaceRoleLegend: Your role in the new tenant
Onboarding.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Open it on your work inbox to finish.
Onboarding.devEmailFallback: Email sending is not configured (RESEND). Use the link below in development.
Onboarding.checkEmailDescription: We sent a company-domain verification email. Open the inbox for the work email you entered and click the verification link to activate the tenant.
Onboarding.checkEmailHint: After verification, you will be taken to the company dashboard. If you do not see the email, check spam or go back and send it again.
Onboarding.noDomainDescription: Submit a manual review request and our team will help you onboard.
Onboarding.manualReviewSubmitted: Request received. We'll follow up shortly.
Onboarding.errorMissing: Please fill in all required fields.
Onboarding.errorConsumerEmail: Please use a company-domain email or choose manual review.
Onboarding.errorEmailFailed: The tenant was created, but the verification email could not be sent. Try submitting again later or ask an admin to check the Resend settings.
Onboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

VerifyDomain.failed: Verification failed. The link may be expired or invalid.

Invitations.title: Organization invite
Invitations.description: You have a pending invitation for this email address.
Invitations.footerHint: If you decline, you can still create a tenant or register as a vendor from the welcome page.

Members.title: Members
Members.subtitle: Invite teammates and manage membership (admin only).
Members.inviteUrlHint: After submitting, the system sends an invitation email. If email is not configured yet, use the invitation link below as a manual fallback.

inviteStatus.email_not_configured: Invitation created, but RESEND_API_KEY or RESEND_FROM_EMAIL is not configured. Use the invitation link below to notify the invitee manually.
inviteStatus.email_failed: Invitation created, but the email failed to send. Check Resend settings or use the invitation link below.
inviteStatus.create_failed: Could not create the invitation. Check role settings or database constraints.
inviteStatus.forbidden: You do not have permission to send invitations.
inviteStatus.validation: Check the invited email and role.

Finance.title: Finance
Finance.subtitle: Financial summaries and project amounts (access controlled).

ProjectsPage.heading: Projects
ProjectsPage.description: Manage project basics and delivery schedules.

ProjectsNew.title: New project
ProjectsNew.description: Create project basics, customer linkage, and financial amounts. UUID is generated by the system; the project no. follows your internal rules.
ProjectsNew.noCustomers: No active customers are available. Create a customer first.
ProjectsNew.projectCodeHint: Not a UUID; must be unique within the workspace.
ProjectsNew.createdAtHint: Saved automatically as the current time on submit.
ProjectsNew.taxHint: Subtotal and tax are estimated from amount minus disbursement fee at 5% tax. The database stores the generated values after submit.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to create projects.
errors.validation: Check customer, required fields, date format, and amounts. Disbursement fee cannot exceed amount.
errors.duplicate: This project no. already exists in the workspace.
errors.database: Could not save. Confirm the latest migration has been applied.

SettingsPage.placeholder: Workspace settings will be available here.

AccountPage.title: Profile
AccountPage.subtitle: Manage contact details, language, and account security. Your legal name is visible only to you.
AccountPage.realNameHint: For internal verification only. Other members cannot see this field.
AccountPage.displayNameHint: Shown in the member list and similar places. Do not enter your legal name here if you want to keep it private.
AccountPage.errorProfile: Could not save. Please try again.
AccountPage.emailReadonlyHint: This is your current sign-in email. To change it, use the section below and complete verification.
AccountPage.passwordDisplayHint: Passwords are never shown in plain text; when set, only a masked value is shown.
AccountPage.changePasswordHint: You must enter your current login email, current password, and new password. We verify your email and old password before updating. To skip changing the password, leave the new password fields empty and do not submit this section.
AccountPage.verifyEmailLabel: Verification email (must exactly match your current login email)
AccountPage.changeEmailHint: Enter your current login email for verification, your password, and the new email. After submitting, check the new inbox to confirm (per email instructions). If you have no password yet, set one in the section above first.
AccountPage.emailChangePending: Change requested. Please confirm using the message sent to the new address.
AccountPage.errorEmailMismatch: The verification email must exactly match your current login email.
AccountPage.errorNewPasswordRequired: Enter a new password to update it.
AccountPage.errorPasswordConfirm: The two new passwords do not match.
AccountPage.errorPasswordUpdate: Could not update password. Please try again.
AccountPage.errorPasswordFlag: Password was updated but status could not be saved. Contact an administrator.
AccountPage.errorNewEmailInvalid: Enter a valid new email that is different from your current one.
AccountPage.errorPasswordForEmailWrong: Incorrect password. If you have not set a password yet, set one above first.
AccountPage.errorEmailUpdate: Could not request email change. Please try again.

CustomersNew.title: New customer
CustomersNew.description: Required fields change by customer type. Tenant is injected server-side from the signed-in workspace—do not send tenant_id from the browser. After submit, the customer profile opens.
CustomersNew.legalNameHint: For companies, use the invoice title; for individuals, legal name or main name.
CustomersNew.displayNameHint: Optional; if empty, the legal name is used for display.
CustomersNew.taxIdHint: Domestic companies: tax ID; individuals may leave blank when not required.
CustomersNew.taxIdTwEnterpriseHint: Taiwan company numbers must be exactly 8 digits.
CustomersNew.imPlatformHint: Defaults to LINE for Taiwan; you can change it.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to create customers.
errors.validation: Check required fields and formats (including 8-digit Taiwan business no.).
errors.duplicate: Duplicate data (business ID or another unique field).
errors.duplicate_tax: This tax ID already exists in the workspace.
errors.duplicate_im: This IM platform + account already exists.
errors.database: Could not save. Please try again.

CustomersDetail.title: Customer profile
CustomersDetail.isActiveHint: Turn off to hide from lists without deleting the record.
CustomersDetail.displayNameHint: LINE nickname, person name, or short label.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to edit customers.
errors.duplicate: This customer ID already exists in the workspace.
errors.duplicate_tax: This tax ID already exists in the workspace.
errors.duplicate_im: This IM platform + account already exists.
errors.database: Could not save. Please try again.

CustomersIndex.heading: Customers
CustomersIndex.description: Manage customer records; open a row to edit details.
